text_original: When the Dao prevails in the world, they send back their swift horses to (draw) the dung- carts.
text_normalized: When the Dao prevails in the world, they send back their swift horses to (draw) the dung- carts.

text_original: When the Dao is disregarded in the world, the war-horses breed in the border lands.
text_normalized: When the Dao is disregarded in the world, the war-horses breed in the border lands.

text_original: There is no guilt greater than to sanction ambition;
text_normalized: There is no guilt greater than to sanction ambition;

text_original: no calamity greater than to be discontented with one's lot;
text_normalized: no calamity greater than to be discontented with one's lot;

text_original: no fault greater than the wish to be getting.
text_normalized: no fault greater than the wish to be getting.

text_original: Therefore the sufficiency of contentment is an enduring and unchanging sufficiency.
text_normalized: Therefore the sufficiency of contentment is an enduring and unchanging sufficiency.
